issues.message: Exercise "try-capstone-scope-and-architecture-sketch0" is an OOP/multifile structure task but is still using fixed_tests with fewer than 2 meaningful validations. Switch it to recipeType "semantic", remove tests[], and add semanticChecks such as defines_class, constructible, instance_attributes, method_returns, created_instances, printed_line_count, or no_stdout.

Exercise "capstone-add-tests-and-readme-handoff" is an OOP/multifile structure task but is still using fixed_tests with fewer than 2 meaningful validations. Switch it to recipeType "semantic", remove tests[], and add semanticChecks such as defines_class, constructible, instance_attributes, method_returns, created_instances, printed_line_count, or no_stdout.
